entries.sentence: Our hotel provides comfortable accommodation near the beach.
entries.chinese: accommodation = 住宿；我们的酒店在海滩附近提供舒适的住宿。

entries.sentence: Finishing the race was a great achievement for Mia.
entries.chinese: achievement = 成就；完成比赛对米娅来说是一项很大的成就。

entries.sentence: The school took action to reduce plastic waste.
entries.chinese: action = 行动；学校采取行动减少塑料垃圾。

entries.sentence: Swimming is my favourite summer activity.
entries.chinese: activity = 活动；游泳是我最喜欢的夏季活动。

entries.sentence: The new sports hall is a useful addition to our school.
entries.chinese: addition = 新增事物；新体育馆是学校一项实用的新增设施。

entries.sentence: The air conditioning kept the classroom cool.
entries.chinese: air conditioning = 空调；空调让教室保持凉爽。

entries.sentence: Her ambition is to become a doctor.
entries.chinese: ambition = 志向；她的志向是成为一名医生。

entries.sentence: An ambulance arrived within five minutes.
entries.chinese: ambulance = 救护车；一辆救护车在五分钟内赶到了。

entries.sentence: The actor changed his appearance for the film.
entries.chinese: appearance = 外貌；这位演员为了电影改变了自己的外貌。

entries.sentence: I have a dentist appointment at two o'clock.
entries.chinese: appointment = 预约；我预约了两点去看牙医。

entries.sentence: They had an argument about whose turn it was.
entries.chinese: argument = 争吵；他们为了轮到谁而争吵。

entries.sentence: We made an arrangement to meet outside the station.
entries.chinese: arrangement = 安排；我们安排在车站外见面。

entries.sentence: Please pay attention to the safety instructions.
entries.chinese: attention = 注意；请注意安全说明。

entries.sentence: The castle is the town's main tourist attraction.
entries.chinese: attraction = 景点；这座城堡是镇上主要的旅游景点。

entries.sentence: They had to cancel the match because of the storm.
entries.chinese: cancel = 取消；他们因为暴风雨不得不取消比赛。

entries.sentence: In this case, taking the bus is quicker.
entries.chinese: case = 情况；在这种情况下，乘公交车更快。

entries.sentence: We had a small celebration after the exam.
entries.chinese: celebration = 庆祝活动；考试后我们举行了一个小型庆祝活动。

entries.sentence: A local celebrity opened the new theatre.
entries.chinese: celebrity = 名人；一位当地名人为新剧院揭幕。

entries.sentence: Our team won the national championship.
entries.chinese: championship = 锦标赛；我们队赢得了全国锦标赛。

entries.sentence: I had a chance to practise English with a visitor.
entries.chinese: chance = 机会；我有机会和一位游客练习英语。

entries.sentence: The concert raised money for a children's charity.
entries.chinese: charity = 慈善机构；这场音乐会为一家儿童慈善机构筹款。

entries.sentence: The museum has a collection of old photographs.
entries.chinese: collection = 收藏品；博物馆收藏了一批老照片。

entries.sentence: The teacher wrote a helpful comment on my essay.
entries.chinese: comment = 评语；老师在我的作文上写了一条有帮助的评语。

entries.sentence: Good communication helps the team work well together.
entries.chinese: communication = 沟通；良好的沟通有助于团队顺利合作。

entries.sentence: Leo entered a photography competition.
entries.chinese: competition = 比赛；利奥参加了一场摄影比赛。

entries.sentence: We wrote a composition about our holidays.
entries.chinese: composition = 作文；我们写了一篇关于假期的作文。

entries.sentence: The bicycle is old but still in good condition.
entries.chinese: condition = 状况；这辆自行车虽然旧，但状况仍然很好。

entries.sentence: Our teachers attended an education conference in London.
entries.chinese: conference = 会议；我们的老师在伦敦参加了一场教育会议。

entries.sentence: Congratulations on passing your driving test!
entries.chinese: congratulations = 祝贺；祝贺你通过驾驶考试！

entries.sentence: There is a direct train connection between the two cities.
entries.chinese: connection = 交通连接；这两座城市之间有直达列车相连。

entries.sentence: Please make this correction before you print the poster.
entries.chinese: correction = 改正；打印海报前请改正这个地方。

entries.sentence: The dancer practised every morning before the show.
entries.chinese: dancer = 舞者；这位舞者在演出前每天早上练习。

entries.sentence: The team worked hard in defence during the second half.
entries.chinese: defence = 防守；球队在下半场努力防守。

entries.sentence: You can find tents in the camping department.
entries.chinese: department = 部门；你可以在露营用品部门找到帐篷。

entries.sentence: Paris was the final destination on our trip.
entries.chinese: destination = 目的地；巴黎是我们旅程的最终目的地。

entries.sentence: This course supports the development of practical skills.
entries.chinese: development = 发展；这门课程有助于发展实用技能。

entries.sentence: There is a big difference between the two pictures.
entries.chinese: difference = 区别；这两幅图片之间有很大区别。

entries.sentence: Missing the final was a great disappointment.
entries.chinese: disappointment = 失望之事；错过决赛是一件非常令人失望的事。

entries.sentence: The distance from our house to school is two kilometres.
entries.chinese: distance = 距离；从我们家到学校的距离是两公里。

entries.sentence: We watched a documentary about ocean wildlife.
entries.chinese: documentary = 纪录片；我们看了一部关于海洋野生动物的纪录片。

entries.sentence: You need a driving licence to rent this car.
entries.chinese: driving licence = 驾驶执照；租这辆车需要驾驶执照。

entries.sentence: Students voted for their class representative in the election.
entries.chinese: election = 选举；学生们在选举中投票选出班级代表。

entries.sentence: The storm cut off the electricity for an hour.
entries.chinese: electricity = 电力；暴风雨导致停电一小时。

entries.sentence: The course teaches elementary French.
entries.chinese: elementary = 初级的；这门课程教授初级法语。

entries.sentence: The new factory will provide employment for local people.
entries.chinese: employment = 就业机会；新工厂将为当地人提供就业机会。

entries.sentence: The hotel offers live entertainment every evening.
entries.chinese: entertainment = 娱乐表演；这家酒店每晚都有现场娱乐表演。

entries.sentence: The children shouted with excitement when the band appeared.
entries.chinese: excitement = 兴奋；乐队出现时，孩子们兴奋地叫了起来。

entries.sentence: The gallery is holding an exhibition of student art.
entries.chinese: exhibition = 展览；这家画廊正在举办学生艺术展。

entries.sentence: They joined an expedition to study animals in the rainforest.
entries.chinese: expedition = 探险考察；他们参加了一次研究雨林动物的探险考察。

entries.sentence: Working at the cafe gave her useful experience.
entries.chinese: experience = 经验；在咖啡馆工作给了她有用的经验。
